{{Quote|Cade! You and Shado get those younglings on the shuttle ''now'' and get off planet!|[[Wolf Sazen]] to [[Cade Skywalker]]|<ref name="Legacy (2006) 1">[[Legacy (2006) 1|''Legacy'' (2006) 1]]</ref>}}
The '''J-1 shuttle''', commonly known as the "'''Jedi shuttle'''" for its use by the [[New Jedi Order]], was a personnel and light [[Starship/Legends|starship]] [[Transport/Legends|transport]] vessel in use around [[130 ABY]].

==Characteristics==
[[File:J-1_shuttle_X-83_escort.jpg|thumb|left|180px|A J-1 shuttle escorted by two [[X-83 TwinTail starfighter]]s.]]
The shuttle had elongated two-person cockpit with multi-level canopy. Its main body held two decks: the upper one contained passenger rooms, while the lower one served as a cargo hold or a hangar. But since the hangar doors were located in the shuttle underbelly, a [[Starfighter/Legends|starfighter]] could only dock or depart when the shuttle was in flight.<ref name="LECG" />

The J-1 shuttles were equipped with [[Deflector shield/Legends|deflector shields]] and [[Hyperdrive/Legends|hyperdrives]]. The ship's sublight engines were mounted within its wings. Conceived primarily as transports for [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] students, most shuttles were originally unarmed. Nevertheless, during the [[Sith–Imperial War]] some were armed and used in combat alongside [[X-83 TwinTail starfighter]]s, which were carried in the docking bay.<ref name="LECG" />

==History==
{{Quote|Younglings stowed. Systems online. We're good to go.|Shado Vao|<ref name="Legacy (2006) 1" />}}
Originally the shuttle was designed for the [[New Jedi Order]] and intended to transport students from [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]] to [[Ossus/Legends|Ossus]] and back.<ref name="LECG" /> At least one J-1 Shuttle was stationed at the [[Jedi Academy (Ossus)|Jedi Academy]] on [[Ossus/Legends|Ossus]] in 130 ABY. It was used to evacuate [[Youngling/Legends|younglings]] during the [[Massacre at Ossus]] and was piloted by [[Shado Vao]]. The shuttle, unarmed, was pursued by [[Predator-class fighter|''Predator''-class fighters]], forcing [[Cade Skywalker]] to take the TwinTail out of the docking bay and engage the pursuit ships. His vessel was destroyed—Cade himself survived—though the diversion was long enough to allow the shuttle to enter [[Hyperspace/Legends|hyperspace]].

==Appearances==
[[File:Jedi_shuttle.png|right|thumb|A Jedi Shuttle escaping [[Ossus/Legends|Ossus]]]]
